name: HNMS Pieter de Bitter
events: 18 Jul 1940 HrMs Jan van Amstel (?) and HrMs Pieter de Bitter (?) departed Balikpapan, Netherlands East Indies for Surabaya. (1)
20 Jul 1940 HrMs Jan van Amstel (?) and HrMs Pieter de Bitter (?) arrived at Surbaya, Netherlands East Indies from Balikpapan. (1)
29 Jul 1940 HrMs Jan van Amstel (?) and HrMs Pieter de Bitter (?) are taken in hand for refit at Surabaya. (1)
3 Sep 1940 HrMs Pieter de Bitter (?) departed Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies for Batavia (Tandjong Priok), Netherlands East Indies. (1)
4 Sep 1940 HrMs Pieter de Bitter (?) arrived at Batavia (Tandjong Priok), Netherlands East Indies from Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
